title: Audio
metaTitle: Sound Reinforcement & Audio Services in Rochester, NY | HIGHLANDMEDIA
metaDescription: Professional sound reinforcement, wireless microphones, and audio engineering for corporate events and live productions in Rochester, NY.
cardDescription: Full-service sound reinforcement for events of any scale. From intimate corporate meetings to large-scale conferences, we deliver clear, balanced audio that keeps your audience engaged.
intro: Full-service sound reinforcement for events of any scale. From intimate corporate meetings to large-scale conferences, we deliver clear, balanced audio that keeps your audience engaged. HIGHLANDMEDIA provides professional audio engineering and equipment for events across the Rochester and Finger Lakes region.

sections.heading: Sound Reinforcement & Mixing
sections.content: From compact lectern systems for boardroom presentations to full line array rigs for large-scale productions, we match the right equipment to your venue and audience size. Our experienced audio engineers handle setup, soundcheck, and live mixing so your presenters are heard clearly and your program runs smoothly.

sections.heading: Wireless Microphone Systems
sections.content: We provide professional wireless microphone systems — handheld, lavalier, and headset — for any event format. Panel discussions, keynote presentations, Q&A sessions, and performances all demand reliable wireless audio. Our systems are frequency-coordinated for interference-free operation in any venue.

sections.heading: Full Inventory
sections.content: Powered and passive speaker systems, digital mixing consoles, wireless and wired microphone systems, audio distribution and processing, DI boxes, and press feed/mult boxes for media events. We carry the equipment to support events from 20 to 2,000+ attendees.

title: Video
metaTitle: Video Production, Recording & Projection in Rochester, NY | HIGHLANDMEDIA
metaDescription: Multi-camera video production, live switching, recording, editing, and projection for events in Rochester, NY. IMAG, content capture, and post-production services.
cardDescription: Display technology that ensures your message reaches every person in the room — impactful, clear, and professionally executed.
intro: Display technology that ensures your message reaches every person in the room — impactful, clear, and professionally executed. HIGHLANDMEDIA provides complete video production services for events throughout the Rochester and Finger Lakes region.

sections.heading: Projection & Display
sections.content: We carry a range of projectors from portable units for meeting rooms to high-lumen models for large ballrooms and outdoor events. Paired with front and rear projection screens in multiple sizes, we create impactful visuals in any venue.

sections.heading: Multi-Camera Production & Live Switching
sections.content: For conferences and large-format events, our multi-camera production capabilities include IMAG (image magnification) so audiences in large rooms can see presenters clearly on screen. We provide camera operation, video switching, graphics insertion, and confidence monitors for speakers — all mixed in real time for a polished, broadcast-quality look.

sections.heading: Recording & Post-Production
sections.content: Capture your event for future use. We provide professional multi-camera recording of presentations, sessions, and performances. After the event, our editing services deliver polished final content — highlight reels, individual session recordings, speaker clips, and branded recap videos ready for distribution, training, or marketing use.

title: Lighting
metaTitle: Event Lighting Design & Rental in Rochester, NY | HIGHLANDMEDIA
metaDescription: Intelligent lighting design for corporate events, galas, and live productions in Rochester, NY. Stage wash, LED fixtures, programming, and operation.
cardDescription: Intelligent lighting design that sets the right mood for your event. Stage wash, accent lighting, and dynamic effects — all programmed and operated by our experienced team.
intro: Intelligent lighting design that sets the right mood for your event. Stage wash, accent lighting, and dynamic effects — all programmed and operated by our experienced team. HIGHLANDMEDIA provides lighting design and equipment for events across Rochester and the Finger Lakes.

sections.heading: Stage Wash & Presentation Lighting
sections.content: Professional stage lighting ensures your speakers and performers look their best. We provide front wash, back lighting, and spot fixtures using modern LED and conventional instruments. For awards shows, galas, and keynotes, properly lit stages make a significant impact on video recordings and audience experience.

sections.heading: LED Fixtures & Atmospheric Design
sections.content: Wireless LED uplights transform any ballroom, tent, or event space with color. We offer customizable uplighting in any color to match your brand, theme, or event palette. Combined with gobos (custom pattern projections), pin spots, and ambient effects, we create immersive environments tailored to your event.

sections.heading: Programming & Full Design
sections.content: For larger productions, we provide full lighting design services including plot planning, fixture selection, console programming, and live operation. Whether it's a corporate keynote, fashion show, or concert production, our lighting team works with your creative vision to deliver polished results.

title: Livestreaming
metaTitle: Professional Livestreaming Services in Rochester, NY | HIGHLANDMEDIA
metaDescription: Broadcast-quality livestreaming for events in Rochester, NY. Multi-camera production, real-time encoding, graphics, and multi-platform streaming.
cardDescription: Professional broadcast-quality streaming to any platform. Seamless multi-camera production with real-time encoding, graphics, and technical support so your remote audience never misses a moment.
intro: Professional broadcast-quality streaming to any platform. Seamless multi-camera production with real-time encoding, graphics, and technical support so your remote audience never misses a moment. HIGHLANDMEDIA provides livestreaming services for events throughout the Rochester and Finger Lakes region.

sections.heading: Broadcast-Quality Production
sections.content: Our livestreaming goes beyond pointing a webcam at the stage. We provide multi-camera production with professional switching, branded graphics and lower thirds, and real-time encoding optimized for your target platforms. The result is a polished broadcast that represents your organization at the highest level.

sections.heading: Multi-Platform Streaming
sections.content: Stream simultaneously to YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn, Vimeo, your website, or dedicated event platforms. We handle the encoding and distribution so your content reaches your audience wherever they are. We work with whatever platform your organization uses — Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Webex, or custom RTMP destinations.

sections.heading: On-Site Technical Support
sections.content: Every livestream includes a dedicated streaming technician who monitors the feed, manages encoding quality, and troubleshoots in real time. Network connectivity, bandwidth management, and redundant failover systems ensure your stream stays live from start to finish.

title: Hybrid Events
metaTitle: Hybrid Event Production in Rochester, NY | HIGHLANDMEDIA
metaDescription: Hybrid event production bridging in-person and remote audiences in Rochester, NY. Virtual integration, interactive Q&A, and remote speaker support.
cardDescription: Bridging in-person and remote audiences seamlessly. We integrate live production with interactive virtual components so every attendee — regardless of location — has a first-class experience.
intro: Bridging in-person and remote audiences seamlessly. We integrate live production with interactive virtual components so every attendee — regardless of location — has a first-class experience. HIGHLANDMEDIA provides hybrid event solutions for organizations across the Rochester and Finger Lakes region.

sections.heading: Virtual Integration
sections.content: Hybrid events combine a live in-person audience with remote participants. Done well, both audiences feel equally engaged. We provide the camera, audio, and streaming infrastructure to connect your physical event to virtual attendees — with matched production quality on both sides of the screen.

sections.heading: Remote Speakers & Interactive Q&A
sections.content: Bring remote presenters into your live event seamlessly. We manage the technical integration so remote speakers appear on screen and in the room audio as if they were on stage. Interactive Q&A systems let both in-room and virtual attendees participate in discussions, polls, and audience engagement.

sections.heading: Seamless Experience Design
sections.content: The goal of a hybrid event is that no attendee feels like a second-class participant. We design the technical infrastructure — cameras, microphones, monitors, and streaming — so that in-person and virtual audiences receive equally engaging experiences. From breakout sessions to main stage keynotes, every element is considered.

heroHeading: AV Equipment Rentals in Rochester, NY
cardDescription: Professional AV equipment available for rent with or without our crew. Microphones, speakers, cameras, switchers, and more — all maintained to the highest standard.
intro: Professional AV equipment available for rent with or without our crew. Microphones, speakers, cameras, switchers, and more — all maintained to the highest standard. HIGHLANDMEDIA provides equipment rentals for events across the Rochester and Finger Lakes region.

sections.heading: What We Rent
sections.content: Our rental inventory covers the full range of event AV needs: projectors and screens, powered speakers and PA systems, wireless microphone systems, LED uplighting and stage lighting, video cameras and switchers, live streaming encoders, confidence monitors, and all the cabling and infrastructure to connect it. Browse our full equipment catalog for specific inventory.

sections.heading: Flexible Rental Options
sections.content: We offer daily, multi-day, and weekly rental rates to match your event timeline. Need equipment for a one-hour board meeting or a three-day conference? We'll put together a rental package that fits your schedule and budget. All rentals include pre-event testing and a walkthrough of the equipment so you're confident operating it.

sections.heading: Delivery, Setup & Support
sections.content: Every rental includes delivery to your venue and pickup after your event. We can drop off the gear for your team to operate, or add on-site setup and configuration so everything is dialed in when you walk in the door. Phone support is included with every rental in case you need help during your event. For events that need hands-on technical operation, ask about our full-service production packages.
